description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front area includes a driveway with two parked cars and a single tall palm tree, while the rear and side yards are landscaped with low shrubs and open spaces. The facade is predominantly white, with large rectangular windows arranged in a regular pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The structure appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back slightly from the lower, creating a subtle terrace effect. The main entryway is understated, with a simple door and no prominent porch or overhang, emphasizing the minimalist aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a contemporary urban residence with a focus on open outdoor areas and functional design.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, large rectangular windows, and a minimalist driveway featuring two cars and a palm tree. The design is clean and geometric, with landscaped yards and a subtle terrace effect.
description_view_0: Front view shows the driveway with two cars, a palm tree, and the main entryway with large windows on both levels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlights the open backyard, landscaped shrubs, and the flat roof, with less emphasis on windows and entry features.
description_view_2: Side view displays the length of the house, the regular window pattern, and the landscaped side yard with multiple shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view shows the driveway, palm tree, and a more open yard area, with fewer visible windows.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple door with no porch or overhang, minimalistic and flush with the facade
